推荐场景: 派对聊天角｜听出故事转折
60秒任务: 「转折和意外」：故事顺序/原因/感受；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 叙事｜时间顺序｜因果｜转折｜感受评价｜总结
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I expected ___, but ___.（预期与转折）
Everything was fine until ___.（意外开始）
Then something unexpected happened.（意外发生）
It changed at the last minute.（临时变化）
The plan was different from what I thought.（预期落差）
I was surprised because ___.（惊讶原因）
We had a problem with ___.（出现问题）
Luckily, ___.（好转）
Unfortunately, ___.（坏消息）
But in the end, ___.（转折收束）
That wasn’t what I expected.（评价意外）
What changed?（追问变化）
We need a backup plan.（备用方案）
Let’s adjust ___.（调整）
The next step is ___.（行动项）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: plan, schedule, message, ticket, order, meeting, mistake, backup plan
Verbs: expect, change, cancel, delay, adjust, confirm
Adjectives: unexpected, surprising, lucky, unlucky, different
Time / Place: last minute, before, after, in the end
Chunks: something unexpected, not as planned, at the last minute, backup plan
